sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, value String);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, value) VALUES (1, '  1!  a,  b.  ');
SELECT splitByNonAlpha(value) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_strings SET value = 'Hello, World! 2023' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT splitByNonAlpha(value, 2) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
